message:
feat: Add Two-Flow alignment for lambda/closure and builtins (Phase 7)

- Lambda: Add TypeConfidence tracking for parameters in genLambda,
  getLambdaReturnType, and genInlineLambda
- Closure: Check isVarUncertain for captured variables, emit
  runtime.PyValue for uncertain types instead of raw Zig types
- Calls: Add .unknown type check alongside .pyvalue for argument
  uncertainty routing
- Type checks: Add .pyvalue handling to genCallable, genId, genDelattr
- String conv: Add uncertainty checks to genBytes, genBytearray,
  genAscii, genFormat

This ensures uncertain types are safely routed to PyValue operations
rather than potentially failing with raw Zig types.
